chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP NO.D-3006/2023 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For hearing on CMA No.22945/2023 2. For hearing on CMA No.14356/2023 3. For hearing on CMA No.14357/2023 4. For hearing of main case. 23.02.2024 M/s. Tariq Hussain and Usman Farooq advocates Mr. Fahad Akbar advocate for intervener. Mr. Dhani Bukhsh Lashari, advocate for SBCA................ At the outset learned counsel for respondent contends that they have filed Civil Petition No.1330-K/2023 before apex court wherein ad-interim order is operating. Accordingly, this petition is adjourned sine-die. J U D G E J U D G E IK
